query_text: a ski that feels alive underfoot

DPS Pagoda Tour 112 RP strongly matches on: playfulness. Review: "Downhill in powder is pure bliss" Review: "Handles beautifully in open bowls"
Elan Ripstick 96 strongly matches on: playfulness. Review: "Decent playfulness and edge grip" Review: "Light and fun to ski"
Salomon QST 106 strongly matches on: playfulness. Review: "Handles variable snow conditions with ease" Review: "Playful enough for drops and airs"
Moderate match on: playfulness. Review: "Not as stiff but more playful" Review: "Not outstanding in any single category but competent everywhere off-piste, playfulness is nice"

Moderate match on: playfulness. Review: "Decent playfulness for a charger"
